caption: The video appears to be a presentation slide discussing challenges related to encouraging community participation and contributions to specific Linux Foundation Networking (LFN) projects. The presenter, visible in a small inset window, is likely elaborating on these points. The slide highlights three key projects: OpenDayLight with its OpenFlow v1.4 and v1.5 plugins, Magma focusing on core network slicing capabilities, and 5G Super Blueprint projects. These initiatives aim to foster collaboration and innovation within the open-source networking community. The slide is part of a larger presentation, as indicated by the slide number "15" and the logos of The Linux Foundation, LF Networking, and LF Edge at the bottom, along with a hashtag "#opennetedge." The presenter seems engaged, possibly explaining the significance of these projects and the importance of community involvement in their development.
